description: Portable example: one realistic multi-core profile per cloud service.

redis.load_cmd: CBS_BENCH_MODE=exec MEMTIER_THREADS=8 MEMTIER_CLIENTS=32 MEMTIER_PIPELINE=32 MEMTIER_RATIO=1:10 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/redis/run_load.sh {bench_duration}

target_role.name: server
target_role.start_cmd: CBS_NETWORK_MODE=perf-net CBS_CLOUD_PROJECT_DIR={project_dir} SIMPLE_SERVER_CONTAINER=target-nginx SERVER_CPUSET={target_cpuset} NGINX_WORKER_PROCESSES=8 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/nginx/start_server.sh

helper_roles.name: nginx_backend
helper_roles.start_cmd: CBS_NETWORK_MODE=perf-net CBS_CLOUD_PROJECT_DIR={project_dir} HELPER_CONTAINER=target-nginx-helper HELPER_CPUSET={helper_cpuset} NGINX_WORKER_PROCESSES=8 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/haproxy/start_helper_nginx.sh

target_role.name: server
target_role.start_cmd: CBS_NETWORK_MODE=perf-net CBS_CLOUD_PROJECT_DIR={project_dir} SIMPLE_SERVER_CONTAINER=target-haproxy SERVER_CPUSET={target_cpuset} HAPROXY_NBTHREAD=8 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/haproxy/start_server.sh

target_role.name: server
target_role.start_cmd: CBS_NETWORK_MODE=perf-net SIMPLE_SERVER_CONTAINER=target-mysql SERVER_CPUSET={target_cpuset} MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=password MYSQL_DATABASE=test MYSQL_INNODB_BUFFER_POOL=4G MYSQL_MAX_CONNECTIONS=256 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/mysql/start_server.sh

prepare_steps.cmd: SYSBENCH_TABLES=16 SYSBENCH_TABLE_SIZE=100000 SYSBENCH_THREADS=32 MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=password MYSQL_DATABASE=test bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/mysql/run_prepare.sh

mysql.load_cmd: CBS_BENCH_MODE=exec SYSBENCH_TABLES=16 SYSBENCH_TABLE_SIZE=100000 SYSBENCH_THREADS=32 MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=password MYSQL_DATABASE=test bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/mysql/run_load.sh {bench_duration}

target_role.name: server
target_role.start_cmd: CBS_NETWORK_MODE=perf-net SIMPLE_SERVER_CONTAINER=target-memcached SERVER_CPUSET={target_cpuset} MEMCACHED_MEMORY_MB=4096 MEMCACHED_THREADS=8 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/memcached/start_server.sh

helper_roles.name: loadgen
helper_roles.start_cmd: CLAB_IMAGE=${TAO_CLAB_IMAGE:-${CBS_DCPERF_V2_IMAGE:-dcperf-bench:ubuntu22-feedsim-installed}} DCPERF_DIR=${DCPERF_V2_DIR:?set DCPERF_V2_DIR} DCPERF_CONTAINER_DIR=/DCPerf DCPERF_CODE_DIR=/DCPerf LOADGEN_CONTAINER=helper-taobench-loadgen LOADGEN_CPUSET={helper_cpuset} LOADGEN_MEMS=0 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/containers/create_taobench_loadgen.sh

target_role.name: server
target_role.start_cmd: CLAB_IMAGE=${TAO_CLAB_IMAGE:-${CBS_DCPERF_V2_IMAGE:-dcperf-bench:ubuntu22-feedsim-installed}} DCPERF_DIR=${DCPERF_V2_DIR:?set DCPERF_V2_DIR} DCPERF_CONTAINER_DIR=/DCPerf DCPERF_CODE_DIR=/DCPerf SERVER_CONTAINER=target-taobench-server SERVER_CPUSET={target_cpuset} SERVER_MEMS=0 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/containers/create_taobench_server.sh && DCPERF_CONTAINER_DIR=/DCPerf DCPERF_CODE_DIR=/DCPerf SERVER_CONTAINER=target-taobench-server TAO_MEMSIZE=16 TAO_SERVER_PORT=11211 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/taobench/start_server.sh /workspace/results/taobench_cloud_server.log 300 1800

taobench.load_cmd: DCPERF_CONTAINER_DIR=/DCPerf DCPERF_CODE_DIR=/DCPerf SERVER_CONTAINER=target-taobench-server LOADGEN_CONTAINER=helper-taobench-loadgen CLIENT_WARMUP_TIME=300 CLIENT_WAIT_AFTER_WARMUP=5 TAO_MEMSIZE=16 TAO_SERVER_PORT=11211 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/taobench/run_client.sh 16 {bench_duration} /tmp/taobench-v2-clients16.log

target_role.name: server
target_role.start_cmd: DCPERF_V2_IMAGE=${DCPERF_V2_IMAGE:-${CBS_DCPERF_V2_IMAGE:-dcperf-bench:ubuntu22-feedsim-installed}} DCPERF_V2_DIR=${DCPERF_V2_DIR:?set DCPERF_V2_DIR} FEEDSIM_SERVER_CONTAINER=target-feedsim-server FEEDSIM_SERVER_CPUSET={target_cpuset} FEEDSIM_SERVER_MEMS=0 FEEDSIM_SERVER_PORT=11222 FEEDSIM_SERVER_MONITOR_PORT=10222 bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/feedsim/start_split_server.sh
